1. Gillis J, Pavlidis P (2011). The Impact of Multifunctional Genes on "Guilt by Association" Analysis. PLoS ONE, 6(2):e17258. doi:10.1371/journal.pone.0017258

3. Love MI, Huber W, Anders S (2014). Moderated estimation of fold change and dispersion for RNA-seq data with DESeq2. Genome Biology, 15:550.
